In the United States, you are entitled to a free credit report from each of the three major credit reporting agencies (Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion) once a year. This is mandated by law under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

To get a free credit report, you can:

1. **Visit AnnualCreditReport.com**: This is the official website authorized by the FCRA to provide free credit reports. You can request a report from each of the three credit reporting agencies.
